MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (in person):

Gillian k. O'Connor, in propria persona, Plaintiff.

Kevin Mills, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, (415) 355-3304, for Defendant.

RE: Defendant CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's motion to set aside default.

Ruling - Argued. At conclusion of oral argument, the court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The City and County of San Francisco's motion to set aside default is granted.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, an order is signed. (See scanned order for details)
